$comment: Active campaigns registry. Operational metadata — not a brand entity. Updated by the operator, read by agents needing current campaign context.

_notes.usage: Store in resources/ for agency-level tracking, or in brands/{slug}/ for brand-specific campaigns.
_notes.creative_ids: Optional — reference creative assets if tracked

campaigns.name: Example Campaign
campaigns.hypothesis: We believe [audience] will respond to [angle] because [reason].
campaigns.fallback: If metric not met by [date], we will [action].
